caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely recording a podcast or an interview for "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a t-shirt with the text "I ON NEVER DO SHIT WORK." The setting appears to be a clothing store, as evidenced by the racks of clothes and mannequins in the background. The walls are adorned with numerous framed photographs, adding a personal touch to the environment. The man seems engaged in conversation, leaning forward slightly as he speaks into the microphone, indicating active participation in the discussion. The overall atmosphere suggests a casual yet professional recording session.
